title: The Skills Gap Fix: Why AR Training is 2026's Most Stable B2B Bet
content:
# Hands-On, Without the Cost

The manufacturing 'Silver Tsunami'—where veteran engineers are retiring—is creating a massive knowledge vacuum. AR (Augmented Reality) training is the only scalable solution.

## The Data
Enterprise demand for 'See-What-I-See' remote assistance and interactive training modules is up 200% YOY. The focus is shifting from 'hardware' to specialized 'software platforms'.

## Implementation
Focus on niche industries: Solar installation, EV battery repair, or modular construction. These are high-growth areas with severe labor shortages.

## Revenue Model
SaaS + Seats. This is a critical infrastructure play with extreme 'stickiness'.
author: MarketVibe AI Intelligence
